page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9a.8xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores on the x86_64 architecture, utilizing AMD EPYC 9T25 processors running at a base frequency of 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware.

Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps. Because the instance allocates dedicated physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, it avoids resource contention common in multi-threaded environments. This hardware profile offers a balanced resource density suitable for enterprise workloads that require consistent CPU performance without the overhead of hyperthreading. Appropriate workloads include web serving, application servers, mid-sized databases, and general-purpose enterprise applications.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9a.8xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 32 dedicated physical cores powered by AMD EPYC 9T25 processors operating at 2.7 GHz, with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration that ensures dedicated execution resources. The system features 128.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-memory ratio of 4.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on external storage options. Network performance is anchored by a 16 Gbps baseline bandwidth. This resource configuration makes the instance highly suitable for general-purpose enterprise workloads, including application servers, web serving, and containerized deployments requiring stable, non-shared CPU allocation.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9a.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 32 dedicated AMD EPYC physical cores, 128 GB of RAM, and a 16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on the KVM hypervisor.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9a.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 32 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 128 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A dedicated AMD EPYC general-purpose instance offering balanced compute and memory resources with consistent single-threaded core performance.
bullet_points: Powered by 32 dedicated AMD EPYC 9T25 physical cores at 2.7 GHz
Equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
Features a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio to eliminate hyperthreading contention
Provides a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps
Designed for general-purpose workloads, web serving, and application hosting
